# Demonstration of the stitching concept

# First, we have a test that executes mcpdiff
exec mcpdiff --help
stderr 'Usage'

# The concept: Standard callgraph can't connect this test to mcpdiff's main()
# But our testcallgraph can make that connection by:
# 1. Parsing the test to find "exec mcpdiff" commands
# 2. Looking up mcpdiff's source code location
# 3. Creating an edge in the call graph

# This is implemented in testcallgraph/stitcher.go
